name: Nigiri Sushi (Finger Sushi)
recipeIngredient: Toppings of choice (e.g., Sashimi, cooked shrimp, cooked octopus, caviar, sliced cucumber)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry mustard, water, and shoyu to form a paste.
2. Shape sushi rice into oblongs measuring approximately 1 inch by 2.5 inches; flatten slightly.
3. Spread the mustard paste evenly on the rice.
4. Place the desired topping on top of the mustard paste.
5. Dip in shoyu to eat.
